properties.name: Feature: 3.5E/PFRPG Target 20
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Standardizes ability checks, skill checks, saving throws, and attack/grapple rolls to always compare against a flat 20. Any natural target (a spell's DC, or a target's AC/CMD) is folded into the roll as a bonus/penalty instead of changing the target number. Ability/skill/save rolls also always add character level; attack/grapple rolls do not.
